families: success — needs Accent.successSoft/successSoftStrong (+Dark variants) in apps/mobile/constants/theme.ts; web has --accent-success-soft (12%) but NO -soft-strong
warning — needs warningSoft/warningSoftStrong (+Dark); web has --accent-warning-soft only (no -soft-strong)
destructive — needs destructiveSoft/destructiveSoftStrong (+Dark); web has --accent-destructive-soft only
win — Accent.winSoft exists but LIGHT-ONLY at 12%: needs winSoftDark plus winSoftStrong/winSoftStrongDark; web has --accent-win-soft
teal (Accent.cyan/fiber hue #4A7878) — no soft tokens on either platform (nearest web is --macro-water-soft)
info — Accent.info reached via paywall item.color; web --accent-info-soft exists (8%), mobile has none
macro colours (MacroColors.* — mc.fat concat in planner.tsx plus MACRO_CONFIG/MacroStatPill dynamic tints) — web has --macro-*-soft set; mobile has none
slot tints (SlotColors breakfast/lunch/dinner/snack via slotColor()/resolveSlotTint()) — web has --slot-*-soft; mobile has none
confidenceNeutral (colors.confidenceNeutral, scheme-resolved theme colour used as chip TINT in TrustChip/ConfidenceChip) — needs confidenceNeutralSoft or an explicit exempt ruling
source badges (colors.sourceAi/sourceManual — NutritionSourceBadge, ProgressOnTargetRibbon) — need soft variants or routing through win/neutral softs
webConcatSites: NONE — the only grep hit is a code COMMENT at src/app/components/MealPlanner.tsx:1510 mentioning `tint + "1A"` (no live concat); zero withAlpha() calls anywhere in src/. withAlpha does not exist yet anywhere in the repo, including apps/mobile/constants/theme.ts — the two existing mobile soft tokens are hand-written rgba() literals, so the ENG-1521 implementation must ADD the withAlpha helper to the token file, not just fence an existing one.

DETECTOR SLOT-IN (scripts/check-token-scale.mjs, 229 lines): findViolations() at ~line 144 runs per-line regexes HEX_RE/TW_RE/RADIUS_RE/RGBA_RE over comment-stripped source; a new ALPHA_CONCAT_RE (identifier + `+` + quoted 2-hex-char string) and a bare `withAlpha(` matcher slot in alongside them (~line 171-180), with the existing TOKEN_DEF_FILES set (line 88) already providing the theme-file carve-out where withAlpha is allowed to live; pins go in scripts/token-budget.json via the shared ratchet lib (scripts/lib/ratchet.mjs). Comment-stripping is already done, so the census's comment-only mentions (EmptyState.tsx docs, planner.tsx notes, HouseholdBar.tsx, MealPlanner.tsx web) won't false-positive.
